phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde ficam os jardins com vista para o mar?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AW MAHR?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os Jardins com vista mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Gardens with sea view.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Gardens with sea view.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh MAHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os Jardins com vista mar.

phrases.text_local: Como chego aos jardins com vista mar?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo UHOOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh MAHR?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Faience Collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde está exposta a Coleção de Faianças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH ehsh-PAWSH-tuh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH FEYEAHNNG-suhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese faience displays often highlight regional pottery traditions.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção pela Coleção de Faiança.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN PEH-luh koo-lih-SOWN DIH FEYEAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception for the Faience Collection.

responses.english: Ask at the reception for the Faience Collection.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN PEH-luh koo-lih-SOWN DIH FEYEAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção pela Coleção de Faiança.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Faience Collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Coleção de Faiança?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH FEYEAHNNG-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Faience Collection includes Portuguese and European tin-glazed pottery, displayed in rotating exhibits.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Towers in Portuguese manor houses typically served as watchpoints.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Museum Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Museum Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Torre do Museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Neo-Gothic Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a Capela Neo-Gótica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH kuh-PEH-luh NEEOO-GAW-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic estates often integrate chapels within landscaped grounds.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, situa-se no fundo do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH NOO FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located at the back of the garden.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located at the back of the garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH NOO FOONNG-doo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.french: Bom dia, situa-se no fundo do jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gardens with sea view are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os jardins com vista para o mar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AW MAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The gardens offer views of the Atlantic Ocean and are a highlight of the former palace grounds.

likely_response.local: Os Jardins com vista mar estão no exterior. Pode pedir mais informações na receção do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh MAHR ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR. PAW-dih pih-DEER MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: The Gardens with sea view are outside. You can ask for more information at the museum reception.

responses.english: The Gardens with sea view are outside. You can ask for more information at the museum reception.
responses.phonetic: OOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH KOHM VEESH-tuh MAHR ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR. PAW-dih pih-DEER MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: Os Jardins com vista mar estão no exterior. Pode pedir mais informações na receção do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tile Room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums often organize collections chronologically by floor.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na receção do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the museum reception.

responses.english: You can ask at the museum reception.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: Pode perguntar na receção do museu.
